scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "VITE_PORT=8111 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8110/api pnpm --dir frontend dev" "pnpm --dir backend dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir frontend build" "pnpm --dir backend build"
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend,electron -c cyan,magenta,yellow "VITE_PORT=8113 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8112/api pnpm --dir frontend dev" "pnpm --dir backend start" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8113 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: pnpm --dir frontend build && (cd backend && pyinstaller --onefile --name finance_server_bin run_server.py) && electron-builder
